hero.description: I build production-ready systems, data pipelines, and full-stack platforms with a strong focus on architecture, scalability, and real-world DevOps.

about.p1: Computer Engineering student at Tecnológico de Costa Rica focused on backend architecture, data systems, and production infrastructure.
about.p2: My projects simulate real startup environments: distributed systems, scraping pipelines, ETL workflows, ML microservices, and cloud-native deployments.

blocks.b1desc: Designing layered, maintainable server systems built for growth.
blocks.b2desc: Automated workflows from scraping to ETL to transformation.
blocks.b3desc: Secure APIs with JWT, OAuth 2.0, and role-based access.
blocks.b4desc: Docker, GitHub Actions, AWS, Render, and CI/CD automation.

items.title: UFC Picks Platform
items.subtitle: Full-Stack MMA Prediction System
items.description: Designed a distributed full-stack system with a layered FastAPI backend, automated scraping pipelines, and cloud media delivery. Built JWT + Google OAuth authentication, CI/CD pipelines, and deployed across Render, Vercel, MongoDB Atlas, and AWS CDN.

items.title: Bank Insight Engine
items.subtitle: Bank Marketing Analytics Platform
items.description: Built a data-driven banking analytics system with ETL pipelines, a star-schema data warehouse, and ML microservices. Designed scalable APIs with Node.js + TypeScript and optimized PostgreSQL schemas for analytical workloads.

items.title: MorphoChain
items.subtitle: Agri-Fintech Proof of Concept
items.description: Contributed to a tokenized regenerative finance platform connecting producers and investors. Implemented REST APIs, MongoDB data modeling, and core platform services in a team environment.

blog.description: I write technical articles explaining backend systems, APIs, and software architecture for Spanish-speaking developers.

contact.description: I'm open to software engineering roles, internships, and exciting projects. Let's connect.
